title: psychopsis papilio var. albiflora
intro: Psychopsis papilio var. albiflora, also known as the White Butterfly Orchid, is a rare and exotic variety of orchid. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the White Butterfly Orchid is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
